examples: Powder mangano-manganic oxide is used as adsorbent to deep remove trace molybdenum from manganese sulfate solution.
The spinel manganic acid lithium is promising to be cathodes for Li-ion battery, due to its relatively high energy density and low toxicity.
The ordinary portland cement of 425R type was produced by the industrial waste slags, gangue, liquid slag, phosphate slag, manganic slag and phosphogypsum.
